title: [Cobblemon] Storybook Hybrids!
description: This Project adds hybrids to the Cobblemon mod that can be created within the Fossil Machine! These hybrids are all based on creatures/characters from Fantasy, DnD, Mythology, Folklore and Fiction!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d51f2ef319d9fa1d39d5f038ff92af2614c5838b.png)

Storybook hybrids is a collaborative addon for Cobblemon that adds a collection of hybrids to the game. Collect the ingredients and use them to create hybrid pokemon based on DnD, Mythology, Folklore, Fictional Media and more! See the current list below!

![divide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb148041a431acebebaa734f7c24287b88d754f3.png)

<details>
<summary>Hybrid Recipes!</summary>
  
**_With this addon, (almost) all the pokemon are created in the Fossil Machine! As a result, we have a lot of recipes!_**


**Asudem (based on a Gorgon - a hybrid of Gardevoir and Arbok)** : 

Dawn Stone + Razor Fang + Bone

**Swimelody (based on a Mermaid - a hybrid of Primarina and Wigglytuff)** : 

Mystic Water + Moon Stone + Bone

**Pixmini (based on a Pixie - a hybrid of Fomantis and Butterfree)** : 

Silver Powder + Miracle Seed + Bone

**Bunnilope (based on a Jackalope - a hybrid of Lopunny and Wyrdeer)** :

Rabbit Foot + Leather + Bone

**Vegitini (based on a Hag - a hybrid of Gourgeist and Eldegoss)** :

Pumpkin Seeds + Chople Berry + Bone

**Mushup (based on the Tako nyōbō - a hybrid of Indeedee and Toedscool)** :

Bluk Berry + Brown Mushroom + Bone

**Pulebina (based on the Unicorn - a hybrid of Mudbray, Spectrier and Galarian Ponyta)** :

Spell Tag + Light Clay + Razz Berry

**Nobiseen (based on the Nobiagari - a hybrid of Unown and Wiglett)** :

Ender Pearl + Bamboo + Bone

**Deathread (based on the Fates - a hybrid of Mandibuzz, Scovillan and Klefki)** :

Name Tag + Roasted Leek + Sharp Beak

**Bugublin (based on goblins - a hybrid of Kleavor and Bewear)** :

Stone Axe + Chople Berry + Bone

**Wispup (based on the Will O' the Wisp - a hybrid of Marowak, Litwick and Zorua)** :

Sweet Berries + Dusk Stone + Nanab Berry

**Anubard (based on the Egyptian god 'Anubis' - a hybrid of Sableye and Liepard)** :

Rotten Flesh + Diamond + Bone

**Griffen (based on the Griffin - a hybrid of Starly and Skitty)** :

Silk Scarf + Feather + Bone

**Guibea (based on Forest Spirits and Totoro - a hybrid of Noctowl, Bewear and Spheal)** :

Chople Berry + Chesto Berry + Chilan Berry

**Pyruff (based on the Lion Dog - a hybrid of Flareon, Simisear and Spheal)** :

Charcoal Stick + Rawst Berry + Fire Stone

**Heirat (based on the Rat King - a hybrid of Exeggutor, Slowking and Raticate)** :

Rotten Flesh + Oval Stone + Kings Rock

**Lakry (based on the La Llorona - a hybrid of Gardevoir and Mismagius)** :

Dawn Stone + Spell Tag + Bone

**Sheetee (based on Halloween Costumes - a hybrid of Eevee and Shuppet)** :

Eviolite + Spell Tag + Bone

**Abductour (based on classic Aliens - a hybrid of Hatterene and Magnezone)** :

Magnet + Babiri Berry + Bone

**Mothespian (based on Moth Man - a hybrid of Zoroark and Frosmoth)** :

Silver Powder + Sweet Berries + Bone

**Romanticourt (based on Romeo and Juliet - a hybrid of Stonjourner and Palossand)** :

Soft Sand + Luminous Moss + Bone

**Twaddle (based on the Turtle Duck from ATLA - a hybrid of Squirtle and Psyduck)** :

Turtle Scute + Feather + Bone

**Hatoed (based on Gnomes - a hybrid of Ribbombee and Morelull)** :

Brown Mushroom + Honey Bottle + Bone

**Mermadoubt (based on the Fake Mermaid corpse - a hybrid of Simipour and Carvanha)** :

Deep Sea Tooth + Water Stone + Bone

</details>


<details>
<summary>Evolution Methods</summary>

Asudem -> Onehts [lvl 21]

Bugublin -> Flufaxe [lvl 48]

Pixmini -> Fairibbon [lvl 18]

Fairibbon -> Whimserina [lvl 38]

Mushup -> Housoup [lvl 30]

Pulebina -> Nonavallo [160 Friendship]

Vegitini -> Rooticious [Use 'Moonlight' 20 times + use bone meal]

Swimelody -> Operaqua [lvl 21]

Operaqua -> Mermadame [lvl 37]

Spewpa -> Storybook Vivillon [lvl 12 + in SbH structure]

Griffen -> Griffeline [Sun Stone]

Sheetee -> Sheeterror [lvl 32]

Sheetee -> Costumagik [Fire Stone]

Sheetee -> Dracosplay [Water Stone]

Sheetee -> Frankostume [Thunder Stone]

Wispup -> Wispricket [lvl 37]

Wispricket -> Fallowisp [lvl 62]

Lakry -> Rivorona [lvl 41]

Hatoed -> Gnomorel [lvl 15]

Gnomorel -> Chantelawn [lvl 48]

Guibea -> Rootirit [lvl 32]

Rootirit -> Trindeed [160 Friendship]

Pyruff -> Guardoar [lvl 37]

Heirat -> Ratoyal [lvl 18]

Ratoyal -> Ratyrant [lvl 48]

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cobblemon 1.7 features</summary>
  
With this update, we attempted to experiment with some features added in the newest Cobblemon update! For Example:

Fallowisp, Rooticious, Guardour, Trindeed, Abductour, Housoup, Griffeline and Flufaxe are all rideable!

Romanticourt and Abductour can ride on your shoulder and be worn as hats!

Mermadame can be fed Tropical Fish, and have her hair brushed

Nobiseen and Rooticious can be bone mealed

Housoup and Mushup can fill your bowl with soup!

and the Sheetee line will fill your bowl with sweets

Aswell as this: Flufaxe can have it's axe changed to be any metal ingot, 

Abductour can be dyed Blue, Green, Yellow, Purple and Pink

</details>

<details>
<summary>Structure and the Storyteller Pokemon</summary>
  
In this project there are multiple structures that can be found around the world (in this update there is only one). These mysterious structures were all once a giant lab, which was destroyed and spread into pieces all across the world.


The pokemon that did this was a Mythical pokemon called 'Storytella'. Storytella was a pokemon that spread stories of fantastical creatures, this would eventually catch the eye of Team Story, an organisation who wished to recreate these stories using existing DNA of pokemon. When Storytella found this labratory, she destroyed it.


Storytella can be found in one of these structures, however she is rare! So why not test your luck?


Evolving Spewpa in this area also results in a special wing pattern for Vivillon.


</details>

![divide2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb148041a431acebebaa734f7c24287b88d754f3.png)

![Mermadame, Whimserina and Onehts, all tanding together!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d75d9c0ba00b2a81e398fe8e23d1dedc67750bef_0.webp)

![divide3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb148041a431acebebaa734f7c24287b88d754f3.png)

**_If anyone is interested in using this addon on a PUBLIC server, you must first contact @JetSetter24 on discord asking for permission to do so. However, you do not have permission to edit the addon's files._**

You are free to use this addon in any videos you may wish to make (Youtube etc) however we kindly ask you provide a link to this page in the description of said video! 

We have worked very hard to create this addon and so we all hope you enjoy!!

Any Bugs you find, please DM me on Discord at @jetsetter24 or contact us on our Youtube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@CobblemonStorybookHybrids
